things.name: Beauvais Cathedral
things.description: Highest Gothic choir in the world at 48.5 metres, a masterpiece of medieval ambition

things.name: Astronomical Clock
things.description: Monumental 19th-century clock with 90,000 parts and 52 dials inside the cathedral

things.name: Galerie Nationale de la Tapisserie
things.description: National gallery showcasing the finest Beauvais tapestries from the 17th to 20th century

things.name: Musee Departemental de l'Oise
things.description: Departmental museum in a former bishop's palace with art and archaeology collections

things.name: Aeroscopia Aviation Museum
things.description: Nearby aerospace museum celebrating Beauvais's aviation heritage

things.name: Eglise Saint-Etienne
things.description: Remarkable church blending Romanesque and Flamboyant Gothic styles

things.name: Old Town Centre
things.description: Medieval town centre with timber-framed houses and lively market square

things.name: Theatre du Beauvaisis
things.description: Regional cultural centre hosting theatre, dance and music performances

things.name: Parc Saint-Jean
things.description: Peaceful municipal park ideal for relaxing walks in the city centre

things.name: Hotel de Ville
things.description: Renaissance town hall reflecting Beauvais's prosperous cloth-trading history
